metadata.title: Attendance | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered attendance management platform for all your workforce operations — from smart check-in and attendance analysis to extra hours tracking, manager approvals, and real-time reporting.

hero.title: Attendance
hero.description: Track check-ins, check-outs, working hours, late arrivals, and overtime in one simple HR attendance system.
hero.floatingNote: Check in, work smart, go home happy

clockInSection.title: Clock in with
clockInSection.description: Employees can check in from a kiosk, browser, or mobile device. Keep attendance fast, clear, and easy for the whole team.

workingHoursSection.title: Never lose track of
workingHoursSection.description: Monitor work time, breaks, check-in history, and exceptions without chasing spreadsheets or manual reports.

liveStatusSection.title: Know who is
liveStatusSection.description: See live attendance status across departments. Quickly understand who is checked in, working remotely, late, or missing.

correctionsSection.title: Review exceptions,
correctionsSection.description: Managers can review missing check-outs, late arrivals, unusual hours, and correction requests before they impact payroll or reports.

reportingSection.title: Reporting that
reportingSection.description: Analyze attendance by employee, department, week, month, work location, and approval status.

features.title: Smart check-in
features.description: Let employees check in and out from kiosk, browser, mobile, or RFID-style flows.

features.title: Attendance analysis
features.description: Review working hours, late arrivals, overtime, missing check-outs, and attendance trends.

features.title: Extra hours
features.description: Automatically calculate extra hours and compare attendance with planned working time.

features.title: Manager approval
features.description: Let managers review exceptions, validate corrections, and approve attendance records.

features.title: Connected HR
features.description: Connect attendance with employees, time off, payroll, planning, and reporting.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Attendance used to be scattered across spreadsheets. Now we know who is present, who needs approval, and how many hours our team worked in real time.
testimonial.name: Laura Johnson
